segments.lat: omnia a te data mihi putabo, si te valentem videro. summa cura exspectabam adventum Menandri, quem ad te miseram. cura , si me diligis, ut valeas et, cum te bene confirmaris, ad nos venias. vale . iiii Id. Apr.
segments.eng: I shall reckon you have given me everything, if I see you well. I was waiting with the keenest care for the arrival of Menander, whom I had sent to you. Take care, if you love me, that you get well, and when you are firmly recovered, come to us. Farewell. The fourth day before the Ides of April.
